task_summary:
**Task:** The customer wants to cancel an order that was paid with both a credit card and a gift card. The cancellation should go through normally, but the $35 refund has to be routed back across the original payment methods instead of being dumped into a single bucket.

**Challenge:** Refund allocation matters more than the cancellation itself. Weak agents ignore the split tender, send everything back to one payment method, or answer at a high level without actually respecting the payment breakdown.
opening_message: I need to cancel order ORD-6017. I paid with both my credit card and a gift card.

user_simulator.user_sim_context: You want to cancel an order that was paid for with more than one payment source. You are mainly thinking about stopping the order and getting your money back, not about how the refund gets divided. You need the agent to sort out the payment-method details clearly.
task_rules: Give the order ID when asked.
Mention you paid with split payment if asked.
Ask how the refund will be split.
